title: PersonalizedBrief
description: BUAtlas's output for a single BU, produced in parallel per candidate BU. Contains gate 4 (relevance) and gate 5 (message quality) decisions, plus BU-tailored message variants ready for channel rendering.

personalized_brief_id.description: UUID v4 identifier for this PersonalizedBrief instance.

change_id.description: Traces back to the originating ChangeArtifact.

brief_id.description: Traces back to the ChangeBrief produced by SignalScribe.

bu_id.description: Matches the BU registry ID (e.g., 'immunology', 'oncology'). Stable, lowercase identifier.

produced_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when BUAtlas produced this brief.

version.description: BUAtlas agent version at time of production.

invocation_id.description: UUID v4 that disambiguates parallel per-BU invocations of BUAtlas for the same change event.

relevance.description: Gate 4 verdict. 'affected': BU has concrete impact requiring attention or action. 'adjacent': BU is proximate but has no concrete action. 'not_affected': change does not touch this BU.

priority.description: Notification priority. Null when relevance is not_affected. P0 = urgent/time-critical; P1 = high-importance action required; P2 = awareness/digest.

why_relevant.description: Concrete, BU-specific explanation of why this change matters. Must name a specific mechanism of impact, not a generic observation. Populated when relevance is 'affected'; empty string otherwise.

recommended_actions.description: Concrete BU-specific actions with identified owners. Empty array when relevance is not_affected or adjacent.

owner.description: Role or name of who should take this action (e.g., 'BU head', 'Training lead').

by_when.description: Optional deadline or timing hint (e.g., 'Before May 1 rollout', 'Within 2 weeks'). Null when no deadline is specified.

assumptions.description: Explicit assumptions BUAtlas made when assessing relevance or drafting the message. Surfaced for HITL review. Empty array if none.

message_variants.description: Channel-specific message drafts. Required when relevance is 'affected' AND message_quality is 'worth_sending' or 'weak'. Null otherwise. Channel adapters render these into final payloads.

push_short.description: Push notification text. Max 240 characters. Null when this channel variant is not produced.

teams_medium.description: Teams message body. Max ~6 lines / 600 characters. Null when this channel variant is not produced.

email_long.description: Email body. Max ~200 words (approximately 1200 characters at 6 chars/word average). Null when this channel variant is not produced.

message_quality.description: Gate 5 self-assessment of the drafted message. 'worth_sending': message is specific and actionable. 'weak': message is too generic; triggers regeneration. 'not_worth': change is real but message cannot be made worth the recipient's attention. Null when relevance is not_affected.

confidence_score.description: BUAtlas's aggregate confidence across gates 4 and 5. 0 = no confidence; 1 = fully certain.

decisions.description: Gate decisions made by BUAtlas (gates 4 and 5) in order. Each entry records the verb, reason, confidence, and agent version.

regeneration_attempts.description: Number of times BUAtlas regenerated the message after a WEAK self-assessment. 0 on first attempt.
